_WARNING: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED — Field names in this file were generated by AI and MUST be verified against live Zoho WorkDrive API documentation before going live. See: https://workdrive.zoho.com/apidocs/
_status: UNVERIFIED — Do not use as authoritative reference until verified
_phase_note: WorkDrive integration is Phase 5 — disabled until Phase 1 has run 2+ weeks (per CLAUDE.md locked decision). Verify this schema BEFORE enabling WorkDrive OAuth credentials.

auth._verify: Confirm scope name against WorkDrive API docs. Check if additional scopes are needed for folder listing.

attributes.name: string — file name
attributes._verify: Confirm 'type' field values match expected lowercase strings

download.note: Use stream=True in requests for large files
download._verify: Confirm download endpoint path. Some WorkDrive versions use /files/{fileId}/download

folder_ids._note: WorkDrive folder IDs are configured in email_config.json under workdrive_brand_folders. These IDs must be obtained from the actual WorkDrive account — they cannot be guessed.
folder_ids._action: After obtaining WorkDrive OAuth credentials, list root folders via API to find correct folder IDs for each brand, then populate email_config.json.
